summary.note: Per-call normalization from durable evidence: pixir child session-log provider_usage, codex per-task turn.completed. Purpose: pixir children make many provider calls per child while codex makes ~1, so normalizing per call shows the per-worker pressure gap is NOT an artifact of pixir doing deeper multi-call work: codex pays MORE kernel pressure per individual provider call. Medians via statistics.median (even rep counts average the middle pair; corrected 2026-07-07, previous revision took the upper value).
